evals.prompt: Generate model layer requirements from the XDM schema at evals/fixtures/TestModule_schema.xdm. Write the output to the workspace at xdm-schema-req-workspace/eval-outputs/swr_testmodule_models.md.
evals.expected_output: A requirements markdown file documenting TestContainer and TestSubContainer entities with various field types

assertions.text: Output markdown file exists with requirements document content
Document includes TestContainer and TestSubContainer entity sections
INTEGER fields include range info in descriptions, e.g. (0-100)
ENUMERATION fields use <ContainerName><FieldName> class names (e.g. TestContainerTestMode)
Boolean fields note default values, e.g. (default true)
Choice sub-containers (TestActionStart, TestActionStop) are listed as separate requirement entries

evals.prompt: Generate model layer requirements from the XDM schema at evals/fixtures/TestModule2_schema.xdm. Write the output to the workspace at xdm-schema-req-workspace/eval-outputs/swr_testmodule2_models.md.
evals.expected_output: A requirements markdown file documenting TaskConfig and ResourceConfig entities. TaskDeadline and ResourceCeiling (ENABLE=false) must be absent. Descriptions must be concise (3-8 words). MULTILINE-STRING maps to str. RANGE attribute used for StackSize bounds.

assertions.text: Output markdown file exists with requirements document content
No descriptions contain the phrase '(disabled by default)'
TaskDeadline and ResourceCeiling (ENABLE=false) do NOT appear in the field tables
TaskComment field maps to str type (MULTILINE-STRING -> str)
StackSize field includes range annotation (64-65536) extracted from RANGE attribute
TaskPeriod field (XPath ENABLE condition) IS included in the field table
Field descriptions do not contain truncated text with '...' -- all descriptions are concise
TaskEntry field maps to str type (FUNCTION-NAME -> str)
